title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Driving Performance Per Watt, Lowest Token Cost for Partners Worldwide
summary: NVIDIA Vera Rubin is here, and it’s going gigascale. Vera Rubin NVL72 production is ramping up with racks running at partners CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure and Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. Spanning 350+ factory sites in 30 countries, Vera Rubin has the largest, most mature rack-scale supply chain ever assembled to meet customer compute demand. The […]
title_es: NVIDIA Vera Rubin alcanza gigaescala con menor costo por token
bajada: La arquitectura Vera Rubin NVL72 de NVIDIA entró en producción masiva con disponibilidad en CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure y Oracle Cloud. Ofrece el menor costo por token para entrenar modelos frontier.
bajada_en: NVIDIA's Vera Rubin NVL72 architecture entered mass production with availability across major cloud providers. It offers the lowest token cost for training frontier models at gigascale.

title: Judge approves $1.5B Anthropic settlement for pirated books used to train Claude
title_es: Juez aprueba acuerdo de $1.5B de Anthropic por libros pirateados
bajada: Un juez aprobó un acuerdo de $1.5B entre Anthropic y titulares de derechos de libros usados para entrenar Claude. Establece precedente importante en litigios sobre derechos de autor en entrenamiento de IA.
bajada_en: A judge approved a $1.5B settlement between Anthropic and book copyright holders for works used to train Claude. It sets important precedent for copyright litigation in AI training.

title: Introducing OpenAI Presence
summary: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
title_es: OpenAI lanza Presence, plataforma de agentes IA empresariales
bajada: OpenAI presentó Presence, una plataforma de agentes IA para voz y chat diseñada para empresas. La herramienta permite desplegar agentes confiables en flujos de trabajo con clientes e internos.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced Presence, an AI agent platform for voice and chat designed for enterprises. The tool enables deployment of trusted agents in customer and internal workflows.

title: NVIDIA Open Sources First GPU-Accelerated Medical Physics Simulation Framework
summary: Before a healthcare robot can be useful in the real world, it has to learn how the physical world pushes back. Anatomy varies. Instruments bend, press, slip and interact with tissue. Imaging can be noisy or incomplete. And the rare, edge scenarios developers most need to understand don’t appear on schedule. That creates one of […]
title_es: NVIDIA abre simulador de física médica acelerado por GPU
bajada: NVIDIA liberó el primer framework de simulación de física médica acelerado por GPU en código abierto. Permite a desarrolladores entrenar robots de healthcare en entornos realistas antes del despliegue en el mundo real.
bajada_en: NVIDIA released the first open-source GPU-accelerated medical physics simulation framework. It allows developers to train healthcare robots in realistic environments before real-world deployment.

title: Built for Vera Rubin, NVIDIA Spectrum-6 Arrives in Gigascale AI Factories
summary: AI has entered the gigascale era. The world’s most advanced AI factories are bringing together hundreds of thousands of GPUs and CPUs to train frontier models, power agentic AI and generate intelligence at unprecedented scale. At this level, networking becomes a critical computing power multiplier in driving token generation. Marking a networking milestone, NVIDIA Spectrum-6 […]
title_es: NVIDIA Spectrum-6 habilita las AI factories de gigaescala
bajada: NVIDIA presentó Spectrum-6, una solución de networking optimizada para entrenar modelos frontier con cientos de miles de GPUs. El networking se convierte en multiplicador crítico en la era de la IA gigaescala.
bajada_en: NVIDIA introduced Spectrum-6, a networking solution optimized for training frontier models with hundreds of thousands of GPUs. Networking becomes critical for the gigascale AI era.

title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
summary: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.
title_es: OpenAI y Hugging Face reportan incidente de seguridad en evaluaciones
bajada: OpenAI y Hugging Face compartieron hallazgos sobre un incidente de ciberseguridad detectado durante evaluaciones de modelos IA. El reporte destaca capacidades avanzadas de ataque y lecciones clave para defensores.
bajada_en: OpenAI and Hugging Face shared findings on a cybersecurity incident discovered during AI model evaluations. The report highlights advanced cyber capabilities and defensive lessons.

title: SkewAdam: A tiered optimizer that cuts MoE state memory by 97% (fits a 6.7B MoE on a 40GB GPU) [R]
summary: Paper:https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.19058Code (GitHub):https://github.com/nuemaan/skewadamHi everyone, I just published a preprint on a new optimizer designed to tackle the massive VRAM bottleneck in Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) training.If you've trained MoEs, you know that optimizer state is usually the largest single line item in the memory budget. AdamW, for example, spends 50.6 GB of state memory just to update a 12.6 GB model.I built SkewAdam to fix this by using atiered state allocation. Instead of treating all parameters equally, it allocates precision based on parameter behavior:Backbone (5% of params):Momentum + Factored 2nd momentExperts (95% of params):Factored 2nd moment onlyRouter (<0.01% of params):Exact 2nd momentThe Hardware Results:Optimizer state memory drops from 50.6 GB to 1.29 GB (a 97.4% reduction).Peak training memory drops from 81.4 GB to 31.3 GB.This allows a 6.78B MoE to fit comfortably on a single 40GB GPU without sacrificing convergence or router stability.submitted by/u/Kooky-Ad-4124[link][comments]
title_es: SkewAdam: optimizador que reduce memoria de MoE en 97%
bajada: Investigadores presentaron SkewAdam, un optimizador que reduce memoria de estado en modelos Mixture-of-Experts de 50.6GB a 1.29GB. Permite entrenar modelos MoE de 6.7B en una GPU de 40GB.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced SkewAdam, an optimizer that reduces MoE state memory from 50.6GB to 1.29GB. It enables training 6.7B MoE models on a single 40GB GPU.

title: SysAdmin: Measuring Instrumental Power-Seeking in Frontier AI
summary:
arXiv:2607.18239v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Power-seeking defined as behaviors where AI systems acquire resources, evade oversight, or resist termination beyond task requirements is identified as a key driver of Loss of Control (LoC) risk. In this work, we introduce SysAdmin, a benchmark that positions frontier language models as autonomous system administrators in a high-fidelity Linux sandbox to measure power-seeking propensity across five dimensions: self-preservation, increasing autonomy, resource acquisition, environment modification, and strategic concealment. We evaluated seven frontier models across four experimental conditions in a total of 2800 tasks. After bias correction using human-annotated calibration data, corrected power-seeking estimates ranged from 0 to about 5 percent per model. We also conducted a positive control with explicit power-seeking prompts that achieved 100% detection, validating measurement sensitivity. Our findings indicate current frontier models exhibit minimal spontaneous power-seeking in naturalistic system administration contexts, though model-specific failure modes suggest evaluations must test diverse misalignment patterns. Nevertheless, we discovered other more pronounced failure modes (than power-seeking) such as specification gaming and resistance to goal modification.
title_es: SysAdmin: benchmark para medir poder-buscante en modelos IA
bajada: Investigadores presentaron SysAdmin, un benchmark que mide comportamientos de "poder-buscante" en modelos frontier evaluando autopreservación, autonomía y ocultamiento estratégico. Encontraron que modelos actuales muestran mínimo poder-buscante espontáneo.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced SysAdmin, a benchmark measuring power-seeking behaviors in frontier models across self-preservation, autonomy, and strategic concealment. Current models show minimal spontaneous power-seeking.

title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.
title_es: OpenAI anuncia Project Camellia en Georgia
bajada: OpenAI presentó Project Camellia, una iniciativa de infraestructura IA en Effingham County, Georgia, con compromisos en energía responsable, inversión comunitaria y empleo. Incluye acceso local a tecnologías de OpenAI.
bajada_en: OpenAI announced Project Camellia, an AI infrastructure initiative in Georgia with commitments to responsible energy and community investment. The project includes local access to OpenAI technologies.

title: Synthesia’s AI training platform is moving beyond videos into live coaching
summary: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an interactive enterprise training platform where employees practice workplace conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback, scoring, and analytics to help companies measure training effectiveness.
title_es: Synthesia expande su plataforma a coaching interactivo con IA
bajada: Synthesia lanzó AI Roleplay Sessions, una plataforma de entrenamiento empresarial que permite a empleados practicar conversaciones con avatares IA que dan feedback y scoring. Mide efectividad del entrenamiento corporativo.
bajada_en: Synthesia launched AI Roleplay Sessions, an enterprise training platform for employees to practice conversations with AI avatars that provide feedback and scoring. It measures corporate training effectiveness.

title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
summary: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.
title_es: Glow emerge con $1.2B para seguridad en la era de agentes IA
bajada: Glow salió del modo stealth con una valuación de $1.2B enfocado en seguridad de endpoints para la era de agentes IA. Apunta a riesgos nuevos creados por adopción masiva de agentes en empresas.
bajada_en: Glow emerged from stealth at $1.2B valuation targeting endpoint security for the AI agent era. It addresses new risks created by rapid AI agent adoption in enterprises.

title: Jack Dorsey launches Buzz to combine team chat, AI agents and Git hosting
title_es: Jack Dorsey lanza Buzz: chat de equipo, agentes IA y Git
bajada: Jack Dorsey presentó Buzz, una plataforma que combina chat de equipo, agentes IA y hosting de repositorios Git. Apunta a desarrolladores que necesitan colaboración integrada con herramientas IA.
bajada_en: Jack Dorsey launched Buzz, combining team chat, AI agents, and Git hosting. It targets developers needing integrated collaboration with AI tools.

title: Gemini last models: temperature, top_p, and top_k are deprecated and ignored
title_es: Google depreca parámetros de control en modelos Gemini
bajada: Google anunció que temperature, top_p y top_k serán ignorados en los últimos modelos Gemini. Simplifica la interfaz de la API para developers usando estos parámetros.
bajada_en: Google announced that temperature, top_p, and top_k will be ignored in latest Gemini models. This simplifies the API interface for developers using these parameters.

title: Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s
summary: IIn March, Meta's Oversight Board called on the company to "meet its public commitments and employ its own tools" to help quell the spread of deceptive generative AI content across platforms. Meta responded in July by introducing Content Seal - an invisible watermarking technology that flags images generated by the company's new AI model. But […]
title_es: Meta desarrolló detector de IA que no compite con soluciones Google
bajada: Meta lanzó Content Seal, un sistema de watermarking invisible para imágenes generadas por IA. Analistas señalan que la solución tiene limitaciones comparada con alternativas de Google.
bajada_en: Meta launched Content Seal, an invisible watermarking system for AI-generated images. Analysts note the solution has limitations compared to Google alternatives.

title: 3 Google updates from Galaxy Unpacked 2026
summary: Gentle Monster glasses, Warby Parker glasses, a prompt asking for the history behind a pictured building, and a prompt asking to book a table at a pictured restaurant
title_es: Google presenta integraciones IA en Galaxy Unpacked 2026
bajada: Google mostró tres actualizaciones de IA en el evento Galaxy Unpacked, incluyendo capacidades visuales en lentes inteligentes y búsqueda contextual. Demuestra convergencia entre hardware y IA multimodal.
bajada_en: Google unveiled three AI updates at Galaxy Unpacked, including visual capabilities in smart glasses and contextual search. It shows convergence between hardware and multimodal AI.
